summary: Location Risk Intelligence Module - COMPLETE. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components and interactions verified.

test_results.backend_20_tests: ALL PASS - Auth (5), Location Risk Scoring (3), Heatmap (4), Geofence Operations (3), Device Location (2), Data Integrity (3)
test_results.frontend: ALL PASS - Location Risk nav link, Map renders with OSM tiles, Risk zones as colored circles, Device markers visible, Incident markers visible, Geofence dashed circles, Layer toggles work, Stats bar shows counts, Map legend shows colors, Right-click probe works

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/location-risk/heatmap: 200 OK - risk_zones, devices, incidents, geofences, active_alerts, center
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/l: 200 OK - updates device location + breach check

critical_code_review_comments: PostGIS 3.3 integration working correctly with ST_DWithin, ST_MakePoint, ST_Distance
Risk scoring engine uses 5 factors: incident_density (30%), time_of_day (20%), zone_proximity (25%), isolation (15%), history (10%)
Heatmap API returns comprehensive data: 10 risk zones, 9 devices, 80 incidents (30d), geofences, active alerts
Geofence breach detection works for both 'safe' (left_safe_zone) and 'danger' (entered_danger_zone) types
Frontend uses react-leaflet 5 with Leaflet.js for interactive map
Right-click probe evaluates any location and shows factors in overlay panel
Layer toggles properly show/hide zones, devices, incidents, geofences
seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded: 9 device locations, 10 risk zones (Bangalore), 80 incidents, 1 geofence for DEV-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location Risk Intelligence module complete. Key components: location_risk_engine.py (PostGIS queries), operator.py (5 new endpoints), LocationRiskHeatmap.jsx (react-leaflet 5 map). Stats bar shows device count, high/moderate risk zones, incidents. Right-click map triggers risk probe.

heatmap_layers.devices: Blue circle markers with last 3 chars of identifier
heatmap_layers.incidents: Small colored dots based on severity

ui_elements.stats_bar: Devices count, High Risk Zones count, Moderate count, Incidents (30d) count, Active Alerts badge
ui_elements.probe_panel: Shows location name, score, level, factors on right-click
